title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.080 - Form of summons
text:
534.080.  Form of summons. — The summons shall be endorsed on or annexed to the complaint, and may be in the following form:
(RSMo 1939 § 2837, A.L. 1945 p. 1089, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2451; 1919 § 2999; 1909 § 7661 
Effective 1-02-79
